title: monday CRM and onpremise exchange accounts
excerpt: Hi I am setting up monday CRM on a company that has on premise Exchange, since monday seems to only accept google and Office365 accounts, we hit a major roadblock, as we would like to use all the marketing features that …

posts.author: i48.tech (Bernat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I am setting up monday CRM on a company that has on premise Exchange, since monday seems to only accept google and Office365 accounts, we hit a major roadblock, as we would like to use all the marketing features that need tha email account to be linked to monday to properly work.

Has anybody found a solution to such a situation? Be it a paid app, using make.com, zapier…

We do not want to loose the functionality of monday CRM, such as being able to contact to clients directly from monday CRM and have its responses go to the Client’s activity.

Any ideas?
